top_signals.title: UK forces board sanctioned Russian shadow fleet oil tanker
top_signals.summary: The U.K.'s Ministry of Defence says the SMYRTOS was in the English Channel and will be held off the south coast during investigations.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin mining difficulty drops 10% in second-largest negative adjustment of 2026
top_signals.summary: The cut hands surviving miners roughly 11% more bitcoin per unit of active hashrate, but all-in production economics remain underwater at current prices.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: FBI disrupts massive AI-powered phishing service using a million URLs
top_signals.summary: In a coordinated effort, the FBI, working with Google and Black Lotus Labs, has dismantled a massive Chinese phishing-as-a-service operation called Outsider Enterprise with thousands of phishing websites used to steal credit card data and passwords. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
